title: Gentle Mist needs a forever home
description: GEORGE NEWS - A beautiful two-year-old Husky...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A beautiful two-year-old Husky cross named Mist is currently looking for a loving home after he was surrendered to the Garden Route SPCA.


> Mist was brought in from Pacaltsdorp where his owners sadly could no longer keep him due to insufficient yard space.


Despite the circumstances, Mist is in excellent health and condition, and the SPCA staff describe him as a gentle and affectionate dog who thrives on human companionship. He is also well socialised with other dogs, making him a wonderful addition to most families.

With his striking heterochromatic eyes and calm, loving temperament, Mist is sure to steal hearts.

The SPCA urges anyone considering adoption to meet this handsome boy in person. If you're ready to open your heart and home to a devoted companion, consider giving Mist the second chance he deserves.

For more information, contact the Garden Route SPCA on 044 878 1990.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
